name: Beauty Spa Express
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients by washing them thoroughly.
2. Insert the vegetables into the juicer according to the instructions provided in "Juicing for Life" by Cherie Calbom and Maureen Keane.
3. Juice the vegetables until all are processed.
4. Add the apple to the juice mixture.
5. Blend the contents until smooth.
6. Enjoy your healthy, refreshing beverage.
